segments.text: Today, we all have assembled here to worship the Sahastrara.
As you've realized that Sahasrara is a very important part of this subtle system
Of course, this is a great day in 1970 that these chakras was opened up.
But by what you have achieved we had to see it first of all when the Kundalini rises
She goes to your void, where is Your dharma and Your dharma gets established at the Nabhi
chakra.
We can say around The Nabi Chakra – Your Dharma get's establish which Is the innate
pure, universal religion is established but then the kundalini rises higher.
Despite establishment of dharma we start becoming little bit aloof from other societies because
they find their adharmis have no Dharma also I think are afraid that might get caught
with their adharmas.
So at that stage we don't want to cross the limits of Sahaja Yoga, one keep to sahajyogis
– to Sahaja Yoga program and our personal Sahaj life!
Of course is important because first this chakra must be fully nourished
And this chakra is actually moves around the Nabhi Chakra which we know as Swadhisthana.
This swadishthana chakra, in a way very important because it supplies energy to brain so when
Dharma established subtle energy pushes through Kundalini more energy for the Sahastrara
And also the energy for Dharma, which was in the Sahasrara – in the Swadhisthana
Also starts flowing with it.
It crosses over and starts rising
In the Sahastrara
Till then we are I would say
We're not yet full sahaja yogis
Because one can become fanatic about sahajyoga
I have seen people who are so fanatic that they cannot even meet
People Who Are Not Sahaja Yogis.
They can not talk to people,
who aren't sahajogas and all the time
they're frightened of meeting people
,who are not sahajogs
Of course you neednot meet
people were evil
.people who
are against sahjoga
talk against it, but those who are seeking the truth which is our duty that we have to
go them.
So when he reaches this state where its established in his brain at time we will be beyond dharma
dharmatit and become beyond dharma means that dharma becomes part and parcel of our
We cannot lose it.
Sahaj dharma becomes within us a part and parcel, which is very great achievement because
then you don't have to do any rituals –you don' thave worry about meeting other people
or that your vibrations will be harmed-then
you don't catch from anyone. You also do not catch other negative forces, no one can
harm that I call as the completion of your Shraddha . That time Sastrara is so fully
enlightened ,that to become Dharma for example we give an example of Christ. Christ saw
saw a prostitute being stoned.
Now Christ had nothing to do with the prostitute, I mean just opposite of it but when He saw
she was stoned he took a stone in His hand and says that those who think have not sinned
at all can throw stones on Me – everybody must stand!
Why is He taking side as a prostitute?
He is a religious man, he should also put stones on her.
But she was standing upon truth that's exactly what happens to you when it is established
in Sastrara – that You stand onto the truth there'a little difference I would
say in Dharma and in Truth A dharma person might become too Dharmic
illogically dharmic, can go to the right or left.
A Dharmic person might think he is a superior
person than others
that why should you try and save anybody else?
Let them do hell – who cares!
This kind of an attitude
could come in someone who's Dharmic
Also I've seen some Sahaja Yogis
Who start new methods
In Sahaj Yoga
You do like this so it will be all right, you'll do that and then it's going to
Because they are not stagnated at the point of dharma –so-they start telling people
what should we say or how?
But when you rise up towards the truth there is no need for any rituals because
Because you are in dharma and here,
You're standing on the truth.
And Truth is much greater than Dharma
For example a person who's standing on truth
He doesn't care for any absurd ideas about religion
Even About Sahaj Religion
he does not care that after all this is sahaja,
this is not Sahaj. He goes beyond, in the sense he sees a global truth within himself
–he sees that Truth which all pervaded-not only sees but he knows and feels as if he
was in that Truth so when Dharma flowers into Truth it's very beautiful happening
and that should happen to all of you.
So many things can linger on if
are only under dharma level
I've seen people going into ego, making money
sometimes they don't even ask Me
And go-on doing thing which
They do wrong
Which is not good for Sahaja Yoga
There's no humility about it
And they don't understand that whether this dharma is standing on truth or untruth.
So we have to go the foundation of Dharma which
Is Truth, as described before it's a tree
Of life
Which has got its roots up in
The brain and branches
In body
so you Have To Go
the roots of everything and that is a place where you reach when are absolutely established
in Sahasrara. In the Sahastrara, all these ideas we have or we can say all this Swarupa
as we take it – We've now become dharmic! What's root for Dharma? Why should be
What is the need to be dharmic?
There are many people in this world who
extremely adharmic, living very well.
According I mean outward expression we feel
that they're happy and alright
enjoying themselves while
we are deprived perhaps of all
so called enjoyments
So at a state
only Dharma
very important to us, which are – may not be standing on truth.
There's so many things like that I can point it out you how Sahaja Yogis falter even after
achieving dharma state they falter .I've seen people giving up their drugs alcoholism
giving up other kinds of addictions, even their language improves and there we can say behavior
is changed.
They become humbler people no doubt but still they are conscious that
They are standing on dharma.
This consciousness has to disappear at the stage of Sastra Ram, this consciousness disappears
because truth is love and Love Is Truth that it's a point where Kundalini meets
Heart Chakra as you know the Pita of heart is here so when Kundalini pierces through
heart chakra.
What starts flowing in the brain, is a truth but Truth that Is Love there's difference
between Truth as itself and Truth That Is Love so out of love for that prostitute that
Christ stood by her he stood on the roots of Truth no doubt what was going through
His heart was the love, the pure Love.
So now when we have Pure Love for someone – We see a person in different manner and
it becomes very sweet otherwise truth can be bitter or painful but truth which is
Drawn with love is just like a flower without the thorns.
It's very interesting how person who is pouring with love and standing on truth, that
' s personality you have to become . Now in expression of Love we can take an example
to understand, supposing I meet somebody and he's telling all kinds of horrible things
about another person.
So i feel tremendous love for him as well the person whom is telling these thing so
now .I take to lie a complete lies which are truth also anyway ,i tell that persons
The person about whom you are saying all these has been just praising You, all the time.
And here we're talking like this – now it's not truth actually but
take help of the lie to bring out a friendship between two persons
So, this is what the work of love that it tries to bring people closer together.
To say things by which they become one united so all the divisive methods we have used
so far, just disappear and we try to understand what is the method by which
We can join people's heart as it if you are in collective consciousness.
But this Collective Consciousness
If It Is Superficial
You Can Achieve Great Results Like As You Have Done It
Maybe
You can build beautiful ashrams, you could do all this.
But when it is filled with love – collective consciousness then the joy of collective
consciousness is complete."
Now people talk about peace!
You cannot have peace without this new awareness, we call it collective consciousness.
But in that also there has to be main tatva principle of love
For example now Sahaja Yogis safe from Germany and Austria are going to Israel
It's very fulfilling
I was happy that they have chosen for this puja people from Israel, and then i found
Israelis coming to Egypt forgetting all the Muslims had done them.
It's really remarkable how people get attracted towards expression of their love
to their fellow men,
other Sahaja Yogis
and once it starts growing
you will be surprised
how we can change this one.
Most of the
problems
human problem
are due to hatred
And is very commonly used
I hate, I hate
absurdity
It's a sin to hate someone
Why do We Hate Someone?
You can hate the sin, you can hate evil but should not hate people just for hating sake.
This hatred that we have is responsible of all problems so far because one person becomes
very powerful by dividing them and this divisive thing has really crushed many countries
For example, our country was divided by the British.
Now they are having division – this doesn't stop!
By dividing us what has happened?
All countries who have gone away from India is suffering very much and those people
who tried to divide the country, thought that they'll become Prime Ministers – these
and those.
Most of them have been murdered by their own people!
You can see clearly how hatred manifests itself it starts from a small point
And it manifests all over very clearly It can be seen in any country being divided
There's no need to divide any country, that creates more hatred and more drama.
In the same way in Sahaja Yoga we should not think of have divisions – now you've
got a beautiful land as there…
You must had heard about Nyara Ganges?
Now people are thinking if they can separate houses, separate compounds why!
You know how to live collectively, you enjoy collective life.
So why do we want separate houses?
What secrets are going have from each other after all whatever is known on the vibrations
–you cannot hide anything- so I have separate house!
Why don't they want some privacy because in Sahaja Yoga there's no privacy.
We know about everyone.
What are they up to?
what Are their problems, what chakras They're catching isn't it so there is no secret
About anything in Sahaja Yoga Everyone knows
So whats the use of having privacy also I can understand its like this you see still
The mind is working like that then
When they are thinking of inheritance, all right I was saying that you can have inheritance
but if your son is not a Sahaja Yogi what to do?
We cannot keep the culprit there and trouble everyone.
It's just rules or regulations which will make us happy and join together – it
the pure collective consciousness and its law because as you know we have no proper organizations,
We've got no clergy ship.
We haven't nothing like that.
Leaders also can shift more times than Ganges river can shift it's course so there is
Nothing Like That It all on a shifty sand we are standing
time, and your mother is another one who tries all kinds of tricks.
The reason I want you to stand on rocks – this rock is emitting love that divine love
And the joy of that love is really so beautiful.
For example, people would like to have their separate bathrooms – especially Indians
suddenly they've become Britishers and Britisher's has became Indian you know?
Indians want them in a separate bathroom I don't why
And this is a very common disease with Indians, and it also spreading to other people I feel
sometimes that they want their separate bathrooms.
In our collective life there's no need – you don't even know when… if You ask Me
…I won' t even now have been in the bathroom or not just go then come back.
I have no time for all that.
In the same way you also should have a concept of society which is living like an ocean,
if ocean rises they rise and falls – just one eunigen love!
I am expecting that kind of a society at the foothill
Of Himalayas, and i'm sure you all of
You realize That himalaya being
The Sahastrara of the world.
Luckily ,I wanted it to be done
Before the Sahastra Puranit is done
With blessings of Himalayas
As should say
But Himalayah Is also like a Sahastrara
where the Kundalini has risen,
when vibrations have come up.
And in sky you can see the vibration
but this Himalayas is ruled by a
wrathful God called Shiva
that's dangerous part of it
so we had to be very careful
if he try play around
If He tried take hatred
among ourselves
Take to divisive methods, take something that is not Sahaj.
This wrathful God sitting on our head."
He's also in Mecca – this is Bhakkeshwar Shiv there!
If you try and misbehave he comes out with his wrathfulness anywhere you are we have
be very careful that this Shiva is everywhere, like one of these lingas of Shiva he's in
Paldi Vaidyanath.
That it Maharashtra Allatura and there people started another kind of Sahaja Yoga also
they were drinking on the day of Shri Ganesha's Visarjan.
And so the wrath of Shri Alanga came and there was such a big, huge earthquake.
In many people were lost but none other Sahaja Yogis and their center was saved completely
now we had a fire also as you know last time nothing happened to your under protection
You are all the time protected.
There was no wrath of Shiva that could work out anything, fire would not do anything to
you because your under protection but this protection is Your Mother's love – it
isn't nothing else than the Love for Shri Mataji which very powerful and protecting
you and helping. In the same way, You develop that kind of love for others – other Sahaja
Yogis or people from this Mother Earth… For all those things your love can not only
protect yourself but also protect others as well! Your attention will start becoming
smaller and small. I should have this,
that ,I like these,
all
the topics
will fall
you'll never say
no question
what do i like
it's difficult for me to decide
if
anything
who are
ask yourself
Who are you?
If You're the pure Spirit, it is nothing but love.
And in Love we think of others – the problems with others!
We try to make other comfortable and look after them
so that they don't bother about themselves
This what you have reach
Though you may be dharmic, you maybe in every way Sahaj but still unless and until reach
that state – in your Sahasrara I wouldn't say that you are alright. You have to work
it out for of course meditation is very important But the thing which stops it
Is your mind It's Your Mind That goes on telling
you, all the time You watch your mind how it tries to guide.
How It tries tell Your now what about Me?
What About My House ? What About my Children?
What About My Country?
Like that!
You go on My, My, My, Ultimately end up into nothing but when
You say, you-you.
Kabir has said a beautiful thing about it he says that when the goat is living – it
saying meh-meh means aye-aye but it dies then they take out intestine and put on
They put it for the cleaning of the cotton and that time what does that dhunki say?
Tu hi, tu hi.
You are the one!
you are,youare,andthat echoes all over.
In a same way we have to think from other's point-of view first offal tuhi when
You say it to your guru or God that you are, I am no more.
I'm dissolved!
I've finished and become one with this ocean of love."

it-I must say that have reached a state where
but still if there are conscious of all
All the time they are conscious, we don't do this.
We dont drink so what?
We don´t fuss about food I mean all their things that have achieved
They're very proud of it you see, very proud
That'we are like these ,We Are THAT
You See because YOU ARE THE PURE SPIRIT
Because YOU ARE THAT
So you have become that
How can i take pride in something what you are
Like somebody asked Me, don't you feel very proud that You are Adi Shakti?
I said what!
I couldn' understand the question.
And he says see now if i am Adishakti why is there to be proud because
I Am That.
Why Is There To Be Proud If was not that then
would have been proud of it but
But I Was So What Is There To Be Proud Of
Like the sun, you see it shines.
It's not proud that I am The Sun
or if You are born say
with Your eyes and nose
a face like A human being
–You're Not Proud!
Am I Human Being?
Am i Human Being?
Are we Proud?
In same way
If you are
That what
You are not proud, you're not conscious of it – not at all conscious.
I mean…I never tell Myself that I am Adi Shakti there's no need to tell but It is so what
do? Now God has chosen me should say to be the Adishakti alright!
But I just don't know What Is There as if like some people think
Sahaja Yoga have been bestowed upon them like some Lordship or something
like that, on them. It is what you have become – when You've become one must understand
That your become that! Like supposing a stone becomes gold then it's gold and won't
be proud of being gold because Gold is gold why will he be so proud? In the same way
this consciousness of being a Sahaja Yogi drops off still it lingers.
So one has to be careful that once you are a Sahaja Yogi,
You're the Sahajyogi so what? I'm a sahaji.
Nothing's great! It is like saying
That i have nose
Be proud of thing
I am a nose
What does it say? Nose already there
But this pride has to go
Thats very important
To realize
that I am not there, I'm no more.
And one of the whole become
The ocean this drop of light
–I don't know if they are any boundaries left in me.
This kind
Of consciousness develops in you
when your consciousness is filled with joy only
just with Joy and bubbling with love
Bubbling With Love
You go on, you see expressing Your love
Whether you talk or don't talk, whether you say about it
Or if not.
This joy is in your heart
Now the Heart Chakra here
The Pitha of the Heart Chakra
Gets filled with light
Of truth
But that truth
is not such an absurd thing that we know of as truth,
it's for somebody ask me what the Truth.
So I said
It was written long time back
That you should speak the Truth
and speak something
people will like
Satyam vadet, Priyam vadet
Then People say how can You meet these two things
Truth may not be palatable and could
something that you say which people like,
maybe false.
So how to make these two things meet?
Krishna gave a very good answer
He said it's
Like this Satyam vadet hitam vadet priyam vadet
You say the truth
truth
you must say. But that truth should be good or should be liked, or should be appreciated
and nourishing for your spirit by which there is benevolence – which creates benevolance
And then it has to be pure In the beginning people may not like
and say that she said horrible things to Me, or whatever it is.
But at the end of It he'll says
That see!
Its so good this was said To me
I have done something perfect
but in any case there's no need
Say Something very harsh
Or hard for anyone
Thats not your job
Go on correcting all the rest of the people
To begin with, many Sahaja Yogis I've seen have been saying you got this chakra caught
up.
You get that chakra caught-up – all these is the play of ego!
You had no business to condemn anyone?
You come from such a condemned condition yourself so why are you condemning others
? Only thing if your capable , equipped and matured enough in Sahaj Yoga then
And you will just take it up as a great challenge of love and you'll do, but won't go on condemning
that person finding faults with the other.
It's very good excuse if we don' t want to do this.
Supposing somebody is sick or doctor doesn''t know how cure so what does he do?
He says see your are sick because this happened ,because went in cold ,because this
Baba, yes. But now I am sick so what about curing me? No! Because you did this because
You should not have done all these past mistakes will go on." In the same way we go on that
YOU did like THIS, YOU were LIKE THIS, YOU went to the Falana Guru, you did this kind
of a mistake and that's why you are like this. No don't tell Him anything just work
out and it works. Of course you can ask if he has been to some guru, but don't condemn
– there's no need for them to condemn anybody about what mistakes they have committed
This is all coming from the consciousness that we are better equipped ,that
You've got knowledge .You're very knowledgeable people
I must say, very knowledgable
You are the Gnostics, all that I accept.
As long as you're aware of it –you aren't!
Once your not aware then what is called Sahaja Yogis.
So i would expect to have this new development in their Sahasrara and everybody's Sahasra
Ram.
We have to think of the whole world, we cannot just think of Sahaja Yogis and also about
seekers.
Seekers are there all right but what about rest?
There's so many problems they're having
And some things that will be done
For example now
Now you've a problem in India
Of poverty

You'll find out what problems there are
You can start some sort of a movement for them, try to help them as far
possible.
It's not missionary like that you convert somebody
or offer name
just do it for your pleasure
because its your pleasure
That is how we will go into the society and you won't be afraid
I know one couple when i ask them why don´t you start

You don't have this fears or nonsensical ideas about yourself
You are powerful, you have powers.
Not only that but
especially bestowed with those powers

If the lamp is not enlightened
What's this lamp for just for decoration
So! This has been used

That awareness within you
that you are something great, better than others.
Something selected or also they say
we're chosen.

with such grace and understanding
all kinds of stupid people out there
it's alright! You know their stupid
just laugh at them make fun off them

but even then

whatever we will be doing

I think superior intelligence by which

how to work it out. Love, this Divine love gives you a complete control over yourself

How to behave?
…How talk people…
...how manage them
I don't now what is the worst thing among human beings
According Krishna It was temper, hot-temper
was the worst thing, but according to Me it is jealousy.
Jealousy of any kind
absolutely I should say like a scum
In Sahaja Yoga also people feel jealous
and they do may not say so because
i don't like them
But then we create problem
They make try to create problems among each other
So one things you have watch on your mind
If there is any kind of jealousy, I am rather worried sometimes supposing
i want to give some present
To somebody then
I'm worried that
I shouldn't do something
That will create jealousy
We should not
Mother might have forgotten
Or it's alright
She running short
But people
Have a very sharp sense
Of jealousy
somebody and I don't meet somebody else. Finished! That person develops a jealousy for the
persons whom i met, sometimes people pester me too much whether
must you or not? Why do they want to meet Me?
Im all over everywhere as You say then what is
need that They should meet Me an talk to Me? What
It's not for you alone I am, but some people think that they have a special right on Me
and the thing is that must meet them individually otherwise it feels very bad.
All these things are to go away in big way when we become as said by ocean then
Then you are not bothered what shore you go, where you travel.
You're only with the ocean moving up and down – that is how it's a living ocean
of love!
And thus we have to develop without dominating others or showing off.
Should be all within yourself, and that's the most enjoyable thing because you see what
we want supposing I wanted something for myself.
So let us try even better but this is if have it in your self . You fully filled
within yourself. So what is most important? What it so much needed, nothing! You are completely
filled with your self contented and then you want to share this the ideal way of
dealing with Sahasrara I think And am sure they will come this whole world's Sahasrara
has to be opened up. This is what we have do it and
We are not going disappear into some exclusive places
that just for meditation you can go there
but,not for escaping the world That's Not The Idea
Idea Is For Meditation ,For Your Growth
It Would Be A Nice Place To Go To Its Very Important
How Valuable You Are
How remarkably important to you, born at this time got your realization for what?
To emancipate the world.
To transform human beings and take whole of these worlds into the realm
of God. That is what you are here for! May God bless you!
